data.title: 国际服「Go, Go, Sensei! Arona's Special Bonus!」登录奖励
data.summary: [Arona's Special Bonus Notice] There's a special gift waiting just for you, Sensei! Log in everyday
data.body:
[Arona's Special Bonus Notice]

There's a special gift waiting just for you, Sensei!
Log in everyday for 7 days to claim all rewards!

🗓️Event Period:
1/30 (Tue) After Maintenance – 2/26 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
